name: CodeIntegrity - Revoked Kernel Driver Loaded
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: CodeIntegrity - Revoked Kernel Driver Loaded
SIGMA Description: Detects the load of a revoked kernel driver

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('3021', '3022') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY CodeIntegrity - Revoked Kernel Driver Loaded on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('3021', '3022') AQL filter query
